_description: Scene 5: Carry to goal — human standing at centre of workspace (hard body + soft comfort zone)
_notes: Human is placed at [0.40, 0.30, 0.30] — centre of the workspace path.
The robot must navigate around the human to reach the goal.
HumanBodyExclusion  (REQUIRE, weight=500 via slack): hard body radius 0.08 m
→ robot MUST stay outside — enforced by HARD DMP repulsion + radial projector
HumanComfortDistance (PREFER, weight=6.0): comfort zone radius 0.22 m
→ robot SHOULD stay outside — soft optimizer cost only, no geometric enforcement
Human : [0.40, 0.30, 0.30]  — same position as the laptop obstacle in Scene 3/4
Constant orientation [1,0,0,0] throughout (upright carry, no pour).
No stiffness reduction at goal — goal is just a drop-off point.

clauses._comment: Reach goal position by end of task
Hard body exclusion — robot must never enter body radius
Soft comfort zone — robot should stay outside comfort radius
Keep end-effector upright — constant orientation throughout
